arts.ttl: Andre Onana transfer update at Manchester United: How Ruben Amorim's summer 'priorities' could impact goalkeeper
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana could face an uncertain future at Old Trafford, while boss Ruben Amorim has reportedly knows his summer priorities.

arts.ttl: Man United to move for £100m star 'on one condition' as new target emerges

arts.ttl: ‘Agreement has already been signed’ for big Manchester United transfer – Entourage getting excited
arts.sum: Victor Osimhen has already signed an agreement to join Manchester United in the summer transfer window. That’s according to Africa Foot, who claim a member of the striker’s entourage has revealed that a deal is already in place with Manchester United. arts.ttl: Man Utd left STUNNED by ‘disrespectful’ transfer target's X-rated gesture
arts.sum: Manchester United supporters have been left astonished by the actions of one of the club’s summer transfer targets, who has been accused of being “disrespectful” towards the Old Trafford outfit. But opinions on Cherki are divided, with the Man Utd fans getting just a taste of what the 21-year-old is capable of.

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer tipped for sensational Man Utd return amid Ruben Amorim warning
arts.sum: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer is impressing in his first job since leaving Manchester United in 2021 after taking the Besiktas job and former team-mate Teddy Sheringham believes he could return to Old Trafford one day

arts.ttl: Andre Onana could miss 10 Man United games depending on Ruben Amorim's £60m decision
arts.sum: Manchester United face being without Andre Onana for as many as 10 games next season if head coach Ruben Amorim opts not to sign an expensive replacement this summer
